faqs.question: Who owns the code and IP?
faqs.answer: You do. Full ownership of source code, designs, and assets transfers to you on final milestone payment. I keep no rights.

faqs.question: Do you sign an NDA?
faqs.answer: Yes — happy to sign a mutual NDA before sharing scope details. Send yours, or I can provide a standard one.

faqs.question: What's your default tech stack?
faqs.answer: Mobile: Flutter (single codebase for iOS + Android). Backend: Spring Boot or .NET. Database: PostgreSQL. Auth & cloud functions: Firebase. AI features: Spring AI. Stack is adjusted per project — I won't push tech you don't need.

faqs.question: Timezone and working hours?
faqs.answer: Based in Egypt (GMT+2 / GMT+3 in summer). Daily overlap with Europe and most of Asia, and morning overlap with US East Coast. Flexible on key meetings.

faqs.question: Communication cadence?
faqs.answer: Weekly demo call plus async updates on Slack, Telegram, or whichever channel you already use. I respond to messages within 24 hours on business days.

faqs.question: Do you offer post-launch maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes — optional monthly retainer for bug fixes, small features, and infrastructure care. Discussed near the end of Phase 1.

faqs.question: Are you taking new clients right now?
faqs.answer: I run 1–2 MVPs at a time to keep quality high. Book a strategy call to check current availability.

faqs.question: What if I only need backend, only mobile, or only AI features?
faqs.answer: Single-scope engagements are welcome. See services for backend, mobile-only, AI integration, and full web platform options.

faqs.question: Can I cancel mid-engagement?
faqs.answer: Yes. Engagements are milestone-based — once a milestone is paid and delivered, you can walk away cleanly with the code. No long lock-ins.

_note: TODO: review each answer. These are sensible defaults based on your profile — edit any to match how you actually work.
